column5: Engine Type: 0=Gas, 4=HEV,  8=Diesel, C=PHEV
Region: 0=North America, 4=Europe, 8=Asia Pacific
Display: 0=no remote display, 6=touchscreen display, A=Centerstack display
Front Seats: 0=no climate controlled seats, 8=multiple setting Heated seats - integrated, C=Heated & Cooled seats - external
Start/Stop Button Strategy: 0=Vehicle not equipped with Start/Stop button, 1=Vehicle equipped with Start/Stop button
8=Heated steering wheel icon enable, 0=Heated steering wheel icon disabled
Heated Mirror Output Relay: 0=not active, 8=active
Front Left-Hand Side Discharge Sensor - Panel (FLDSP) & Front Left-Hand Side Discharge Sensor - Floor (FLDSF)
0=FLDSP not present & FLDSF not present
2=FLDSP not present & FLDSF present
Front Right-Hand Side Discharge Sensor - Panel (FRDSP) & Front Right-Hand Side Discharge Sensor - Floor (FRDSF)
0=FRDSP not present & FRDSF not present
2=FRDSP not present & FRDSF present
Front Heated Seats High Setting (degrees F converted to hex)
Front Heated Seats Medium Setting (degrees F converted to hex)
Front Heated Seats Low Setting (degrees F converted to hex)
2015-2017s only: Snow Plow: 0=disabled, 1=enabled (need switch FL3Z-13D730-LA which is the hazard/plow)
2018-2019s: Voice Blower Limiting (VBL) & Eco Mode (EM) & Snow Plow Button/Strategy (SP)
0=VBL not supported, EM not supported, SP disabled
column6: 8=VBL supported, EM not supported, SP disabled

column5: 1=VBL not supported, EM not supported, SP enabled
column6: 9=VBL supported, EM not supported, SP enabled

column5: 2=VBL not supported, EM supported, SP disabled
column6: A=VBL supported, EM supported, SP disabled

column5: 3=VBL not supported, EM supported, SP enabled
column6: B=VBL supported, EM supported, SP enabled

column5: VIN #
